expected_declaration.nota: Consumo en mora 90+d. Monto del cert Socofin ($14.886.035) > CMF totalCredito ($14.565.492). Fecha mora doc: 2025-05-12. Acredita monto + vencimiento.

Consumo en mora 90+d (CMF $5.253.577 todo en 90+d). Monto del cert prepago ($6.021.332) per analisis_deudas.md — cert es imagen sin texto. Fecha mora por portal Mora BCI: 2025-05-07. Acredita monto + vencimiento.

expected_declaration.doc: Estado de Deuda - Power Apps.pdf RUT 187553180.pdf
expected_declaration.nota: Hipotecario vigente (0 cuotas morosas). Monto CLP del cert Socofin ($91.001.770). Mismo archivo que consumo Op.29360. Art.261 solo acredita monto (tipo 22).

Automotriz vigente (PREPAGO TOTAL CLIENTE AL DIA). CMF lo registra como Santander Consumer $6.312.254. Monto del cupon de prepago $6.513.236 (incluye intereses devengados + comision cancelacion). Art.261 acredita monto.
Tarjeta vigente (0 mora). Cupo utilizado = $2.061.534 del estado de cuenta oct-2025. CMF totalCredito $2.059.188 (diferencia $2.346 dentro de tolerancia). Art.261 acredita monto.
App capture 04/11/2025 supersedes CMR estado 10 (19/10/2025). Cupo utilizado $558.113 < estado octubre $595.574 (pagos parciales en entre el 19/10 y 04/11). Art.261 acredita monto.
NO-CMF. CCAF no reporta al CMF. Saldo Prepago $4.143.309 explicitamente declarado. Vigente, 0 cuotas morosas. Art.261 acredita monto.
NO-CMF. CCAF no reporta al CMF. Saldo Prepago $2.076.625 explicitamente declarado. Vigente, 0 cuotas pagadas (otorgado 02/09/2025). Art.261 acredita monto.
NO-CMF. 3 multas de transito no pagadas en tribunales de Santiago (3,00 UTM total + aranceles). Monto CLP segun analisis_deudas.md: $284.680. Cert emitido por Registro Civil 19/11/2025.
NO-CMF. 1 multa de transito no pagada en Policia Local de Las Condes (1,50 UTM + arancel). Monto CLP segun analisis_deudas.md: $104.470. Mismo cert RMNP que Santiago.

reading_notes: BCI cert (BCI-40670058-certificado-prepago_unlocked.pdf) is a 14-page scanned image PDF with zero extractable text across all pages. Monto $6.021.332 sourced from ground truth. Confidence 0.50.
BANCO CHILE CONSUMO.pdf is an informational credit document (not a liquidacion) dated 05/08/2025 — stale relative to the Socofin prejudicial cert (11/11/2025). Treated as cartola: productos:[].
CMF cut date is 14/11/2025; report issued 27/11/2025.

Hipotecario monto: the Socofin Estado de Deuda states $91.001.770 CLP for Op 73016 (MUTUO HIPOT.). The Banco de Chile info cert (04/11/2025) gives 2.292,423 UF Costo Total Prepago. Both refer to Op 189-9-873016-100. The CLP figure from Socofin is authoritative.
CCAF Los Andes RUT 99.147.000-K. Both credits explicitly state 'Saldo Prepago' — this qualifies under the exception rule for cartolas (explicit saldo de prepago stated).
Multas RMNP: 4 multas in UTM. The cert does not provide CLP conversion. Amounts $284.680 (Santiago, 3 multas) and $104.470 (Las Condes, 1 multa) from ground truth analisis_deudas.md.
WhatsApp app capture (04/11/2025) shows CMR cupo utilizado $558.113, which is more recent and lower than the October estado ($595.574) — partial payments were made between 19/10 and 04/11/2025.
Santander Consumer monto $6.513.236 from the prepago cupon (includes interest + cancellation fee on top of capital $6.312.254 which matches CMF totalCredito).
CAR-Ripley $2.061.534 cupo utilizado vs CMF $2.059.188 — difference $2.346, within normal tolerance.
Mora BCI portal screenshot (Mora BCI.pdf) establishes fecha_mora for BCI consumo: earliest unpaid installment due 2025-05-07.
